form.formComment: Won two starts back over 350m at Q Straight. Last start he finished 2nd on April 7 over 457m at this track behind Satoshi beaten 1.5 lengths (25.65) in a Grade 5. Draw likely to suit. Racing well and can find winning form again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back over 350m at Q Straight. Last start he finished 2nd on April 7 over 457m at this track behind Satoshi beaten 1.5 lengths (25.65) in a Grade 5. Draw likely to suit. Racing well and can find winning form again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Severely checked in the back straight and lost ground.
Lost ground in the back straight.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished fifth on April 9 over 350m at Q Straight behind Unacceptable Col, beaten 7 lengths (19.26) in a Grade 5. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Last start finished fifth on April 9 over 350m at Q Straight behind Unacceptable Col, beaten 7 lengths (19.26) in a Grade 5. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. Last start finished eighth over 457m at this track, beaten 15 lengths. Not keen this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. Last start finished eighth over 457m at this track, beaten 15 lengths. Not keen this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dragged down approaching the first turn and lost considerable ground.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy (21.80), beating Jane's Jet. Can keep things rolling.

formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy (21.80), beating Jane's Jet. Can keep things rolling.

form.formComment: Jumps from box 6 for the first time after placing latest at this track (25.88) in a Grade 5. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 457m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 457m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Q Straight to win by 1.3 lengths in 18.76, beating Cousin Henry. Last start finished 5th over 457m at this track beaten 7 lengths (25.87) behind Boom Town in a Grade 4/5 on April 7. Has ability and worth including.
